description:
Goal:
Support California DROP as a preferred official channel without scripting hostile submissions.

Scope:
- identify CA-registered brokers from official/public registry source
- match broker registry entries to DROP coverage
- generate user instructions/status tracking

Acceptance:
- DROP-covered brokers are flagged.
- Final government portal submission remains user action unless official API exists.
- No scripted POST to government portal.
title: DROP helper planning and registry matching
